---
css: main.css
---
# Introduction 

This is a book created from markdown and executable code.

::: {layout="[33, 33, 33]"}
::: {#first-column}
Content for column 1.
:::

::: {#second-column}
Content for column 2.
:::

::: {#third-column}
Content for column 3.
:::
:::

See @knuth84 for additional discussion of literate programming.
